\tzpentry{ID11400}{Portal Surface-Tension Force Component}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
The surface-tension component is modeled by a Young-Laplace-style curvature pressure term.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
F_{s}=\gamma\left(\frac{1}{R_{1}}+\frac{1}{R_{2}}\right)
